published_prior_art.cite: Gunsilius2023DiSCo / Chen2020DistributionalSC: distributional synthetic control targets a marginal counterfactual distribution
FanPark2010SharpBounds + FirpoRidder2019: DTE is partially identified from marginals, with pointwise Makarov sharpness and nonuniform functional issues
AtheyImbens2006CIC + CallawayLi2019QTEDID + FanYu2012PartialDID: rank/dependence restrictions identify QTT/DTE while weaker DID-style restrictions leave partial ID
AtheyImbens2006CIC / CallawayLi2019QTEDID: rank or copula restrictions deliver the plug-in quantile-effect/pushforward formula

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The marginal-counterfactual identification statement is already the core object of Gunsilius2023DiSCo and Chen2020DistributionalSC, not a new theorem.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The comonotone/copula-stability positive corner is the standard rank/dependence-restriction formula from AtheyImbens2006CIC and CallawayLi2019QTEDID.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The closest published comparator is FirpoRidder2019 JoE, the published version sharpening the 2008 working-paper claim; the proposal should compare against it directly.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Flagship claim cites FanPark2010SharpBounds, FirpoRidder2008Functionals, Callaway2021BoundsDTEPanel, Gunsilius2023DiSCo, and Chen2020DistributionalSC without a section/equation/page anchor for the exact gap.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The taxonomy claim cites AtheyImbens2006CIC and CallawayLi2019QTEDID by bibkey but lacks a location-level anchor tying their rank/dependence assumptions to the proposed iff frontier.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The hierarchy/taxonomy result is qualitative and exposes no computable threshold, LP width, diagnostic, or benchmarkable observable quantity.

novelty_flags.label: Proposal
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; the kernel is currently a DiSCo-label composition of known marginal-versus-joint/Makarov logic and needs a stricter diagnose-and-correct or iff frontier against a named DiSCo/QTE workflow to reach flagship.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the 2008-only Firpo-Ridder comparison with FirpoRidder2019 and state exactly what Conjecture 1 adds beyond their result on marginals, Makarov bounds, and functionals.

Turn the DiSCo comparison into a diagnose-then-correct result: name the estimator/workflow that reports quantile effects, decompose its plug-in curve from the true DTE object, and make W(d) the corrected reporting diagnostic.
Add a location-anchored comparator table for each flagship conjecture with section/equation/page anchors in Gunsilius, Callaway, Fan-Park, Firpo-Ridder, Athey-Imbens, and Callaway-Li.
Give Conjecture 2 an observable diagnostic, such as a computable copula-discrepancy or LP-based equality test between comonotone and C-star pushforwards.

recommended_next_step: Revise toward a named DiSCo/QTE diagnose-and-correct frontier and anchor the flagship gap against FirpoRidder2019 plus location-specific comparator claims.
